race.comment: RUSTEMO (3) opened this prep with three straight victories then ran the race of his life last start when a close third in the Group 3 Winx Guineas at the Sunshine Coast. Seems well treated under today's conditions so expect him to be fighting out the finish again. BLITZBURG (2) has been racing extra well in open company of late, finishing runner-up most recently over 1200m at the Gold Coast. On trial at this distance which is the only query. HILLIER (1) is the class runner of the field. Made a late surge to be beaten under two lengths in the Guineas at the Sunshine Coast last time out. A whopping 62 kg may be a stopper but he is too good to leave out. SWAG (9) stormed home to salute over 1420m here last time. Looks ready for another crack at this trip. On-pacer SWING STATE (7) has never raced better and can sneak into the frame despite taking on a much deeper field today.
